---
title: "Workshop on Bayesian Data Analysis (using brms and Stan)"
---

[Here](https://github.com/stephenrho/bayes-workshop) are materials for a workshop on Bayesian data analysis that I gave at the Rotman Research Institute (Oct 2019) and then at Case Western Reserve University (Feb 2020). The workshop aims to provide:

- A conceptual understanding of Bayesian analysis
- An introduction to the [`brms`](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/brms/index.html) package for `R` and example analyses
- An introduction to the [`Stan`](https://mc-stan.org/) language (and [`rstan`](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/rstan/index.html))
- There are also slides giving a more general introduction to mixed models and MCMC sampling
